code: import{io}from'socket.io-client';const SOCKET_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_SOCKET_URL||'http://localhost:5500';let socket=null;export function getSocket(){if(!socket){socket=io(SOCKET_URL,{autoConnect:true,reconnectionAttempts:5,reconnectionDelay:2000});}return socket;}export function joinUserRoom(userId){const s=getSocket();s.emit('join',userId);}export function disconnectSocket(){if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;}}export default getSocket;
